sources.title: 2021 Primary Mathematics Syllabus Primary One to Six, updated October 2025

paperSpecs.mode: No calculator unless official format says otherwise

subtopics.title: Whole numbers
subtopics.content: Place value, comparison, ordering, patterns, four operations, factors and multiples.

subtopics.title: Fractions
subtopics.content: Equivalent fractions, simplifying, comparison, four operations, mixed numbers, and word problems.

subtopics.title: Decimals
subtopics.content: Decimal notation, comparison, four operations, approximation, and money/measurement contexts.

subtopics.title: Percentage
subtopics.content: Percent as part of a whole, percentage increase/decrease, percentage change, and applied word problems.

subtopics.title: Ratio
subtopics.content: Equivalent ratios, part-whole comparison, unchanged quantity models, and multi-step ratio problems.

subtopics.title: Rate and speed
subtopics.content: Rate, speed, distance, time, unit conversion, average speed, and travel problems.

subtopics.title: Algebra
subtopics.content: Use of letters, forming expressions, simplifying, substitution, and solving simple equations.

subtopics.title: Length, mass, volume and time
subtopics.content: Measurement units, compound units, unit conversion, duration, and 24-hour time.

subtopics.title: Area and perimeter
subtopics.content: Perimeter and area of squares, rectangles, composite figures, triangles, and related word problems.

subtopics.title: Volume of cubes and cuboids
subtopics.content: Volume formula, missing dimension problems, composite solids, and capacity contexts.

subtopics.title: Angles
subtopics.content: Angle measurement, angles on a straight line, around a point, vertically opposite angles, triangles and quadrilaterals.

subtopics.title: Circle
subtopics.content: Radius, diameter, circumference, area, and composite figures involving circles.

subtopics.title: 2D/3D shapes and nets
subtopics.content: Properties of 2D and 3D shapes, patterns, nets, and visualisation.

subtopics.title: Tables, picture graphs, bar graphs, line graphs and pie charts
subtopics.content: Read, interpret and compare data using tables and graphs, including pie charts.

subtopics.title: Average
subtopics.content: Mean of a set of data, total-value reasoning, missing value problems and data interpretation.

noteCards.title: Choose a model before calculating
noteCards.body: For PSLE problem sums, identify whether the question is part-whole, comparison, before-after, rate, or geometry before choosing the operation.
noteCards.workedExample: For a ratio question, draw units first, identify the unchanged quantity, then convert units to values.
noteCards.commonMistake: Starting with arithmetic before identifying the relationship.

quizCards.prompt: In a before-after ratio question, what should you check before converting ratio units to actual values?
quizCards.explanation: The unchanged quantity anchors the unit comparison between the two ratios.
